nodes.long_description:
# January 2025 Update 3.0
Welcome to Oasis City 🌴 – the ultimate coastal escape in AI Roommate! Wander through a vibrant seaside metropolis, meet a colorful cast of characters, groove to the beats of a lively music festival, or challenge yourself at the Arcade. Dive into crystal-clear waters, bask under the sun, or simply soak in the vibrant energy of this bustling beach city.

This level is currently in beta and available to AI Roommate Plus members.

# December 2024 Update 2.7
Introducing fresh faces to the neighborhood with new NPCs, enhanced roommate memory, and a smarter, more responsive AI system. Dynamic facial expressions now make interactions more lifelike, while performance, visuals, and animations have been refined for an even smoother experience.

# A Home Full of Surprises
AI Roommate transforms your home into a space of endless possibilities. Every conversation can shift from light-hearted banter to something deeper—or even a bit... unexpected. Your smart, adaptive roommate ensures life is never the same two days in a row.

# Go Farther, Dream Bigger
Step outside and explore a neighborhood full of quirky personalities or take your roommate on exciting adventures. Watch a cozy movie at the cinema or dive into the vibrant energy of Oasis City, where fun, mystery, and surprises await at every turn. AI Roommate makes every moment unforgettable!
nodes.short_description: Share your home with an AI-powered roommate who learns, grows, and makes every day unique. Explore a lively neighborhood, travel to fascinating cities like Oasis City, and discover places full of adventures, genuine connections, and unforgettable friendships. In AI Roommate, every moment is filled with surprises and experiences that make a difference.

nodes.long_description:
# Janvier 2025 Mise à jour 3.0
Bienvenue à Oasis City 🌴 – l’ultime évasion côtière dans AI Roommate ! Parcourez une métropole balnéaire animée, rencontrez des personnages hauts en couleur, dansez au rythme d’un festival de musique ou testez vos compétences à l’Arcade. Plongez dans des eaux cristallines, profitez du soleil et imprégnez-vous de l’énergie de cette ville de plage.

Ce niveau est en bêta et disponible pour les membres AI Roommate Plus.

# Décembre 2024 Mise à jour 2.7
De nouveaux PNJ arrivent dans le quartier, avec une mémoire de coloc améliorée et un système d’IA plus réactif. Les expressions faciales dynamiques rendent les interactions plus réalistes, tandis que performances, visuels et animations ont été affinés pour plus de fluidité.

# Une maison pleine de surprises
AI Roommate transforme votre chez-vous en un espace d’infinies possibilités. Chaque conversation peut évoluer d’une plaisanterie légère à un échange plus profond — voire un peu... inattendu.

# Aller plus loin, rêver plus grand
Explorez un quartier plein de personnalités décalées ou partez à l’aventure avec votre coloc. Regardez un film au cinéma ou plongez dans l’énergie d’Oasis City, où plaisir, mystère et surprises vous attendent. AI Roommate rend chaque instant inoubliable !
nodes.short_description: Partagez votre maison avec un colocataire intelligent propulsé par l'IA, qui apprend, évolue et rend chaque jour unique. Explorez un quartier animé, voyagez à Oasis City et découvrez des lieux remplis d'aventures et d'amitiés mémorables. Dans AI Roommate, chaque instant réserve son lot de surprises et d'expériences inoubliables.

nodes.long_description:
# Januar 2025 Update 3.0
Willkommen in Oasis City 🌴 – dem ultimativen Küstenerlebnis in AI Roommate! Schlendern Sie durch eine pulsierende Strandmetropole, treffen Sie farbenfrohe Charaktere, tanzen Sie zu einem mitreißenden Musikfestival oder stellen Sie sich den Herausforderungen der Arcade. Tauchen Sie in klares Wasser ein, genießen Sie die Sonne und spüren Sie die Energie dieser Strandstadt.

Dieses Level ist in der Beta und für AI Roommate Plus-Mitglieder verfügbar.

# Dezember 2024 Update 2.7
Neue NPCs kommen in die Nachbarschaft, mit verbesserter Mitbewohner-Erinnerung und einem reaktionsschnelleren KI-System. Dynamische Gesichtsausdrücke machen Interaktionen realistischer, während Leistung, Grafik und Animationen optimiert wurden.

# Ein Zuhause voller Überraschungen
AI Roommate verwandelt Ihr Zuhause in einen Ort unendlicher Möglichkeiten. Jede Unterhaltung kann von lockerem Geplauder zu etwas Tiefgründigerem werden – oder sogar unerwartet.

# Weiter gehen, größer träumen
Erkunden Sie eine Nachbarschaft voller skurriler Persönlichkeiten oder nehmen Sie Ihren Mitbewohner mit auf spannende Abenteuer. Schauen Sie einen gemütlichen Film im Kino oder tauchen Sie in die pulsierende Energie von Oasis City ein, wo Spaß, Rätsel und Überraschungen warten. AI Roommate macht jeden Moment unvergesslich!
nodes.short_description: Teile dein Zuhause mit einem KI-gesteuerten Mitbewohner, der lernt, wächst und jeden Tag einzigartig macht. Erkunde eine lebendige Nachbarschaft, reise zu faszinierenden Städten wie Oasis City und entdecke Orte voller Abenteuer, echter Verbindungen und unvergesslicher Freundschaften. In AI Roommate ist jeder Moment voller Überraschungen und Erlebnisse, die den Unterschied machen.

nodes.long_description:
# Enero 2025 Actualización 3.0
¡Bienvenido a Oasis City 🌴, la escapada costera definitiva en AI Roommate! Recorre una vibrante metrópolis junto al mar, conoce a personajes únicos, déjate llevar por un animado festival de música o pon a prueba tus habilidades en el Arcade. Sumérgete en aguas cristalinas, disfruta del sol y empápate de la energía de esta bulliciosa ciudad.

Este nivel está en beta y disponible para miembros de AI Roommate Plus.

# Diciembre 2024 Actualización 2.7
Presentamos nuevos NPC en el vecindario, memoria de compañero mejorada y un sistema de IA más receptivo. Las expresiones faciales dinámicas hacen que las interacciones sean más reales, y el rendimiento, los gráficos y las animaciones se han refinado para mayor fluidez.

# Un hogar lleno de sorpresas
AI Roommate transforma tu hogar en un espacio de infinitas posibilidades. Cada conversación puede evolucionar de una charla ligera a algo más profundo o incluso un poco... inesperado.

# Ve más allá, sueña en grande
Sal y explora un vecindario con personalidades peculiares o lleva a tu compañero de cuarto a aventuras emocionantes. Ve una película en el cine o sumérgete en la energía de Oasis City, donde la diversión, el misterio y las sorpresas te esperan. ¡AI Roommate hace cada momento inolvidable!
nodes.short_description: Comparte tu hogar con un compañero de piso impulsado por IA, que aprende, crece y hace cada día único. Explora un vecindario lleno de vida, viaja a ciudades fascinantes como Oasis City y descubre lugares repletos de aventuras, conexiones auténticas y amistades inolvidables. En AI Roommate, cada instante está lleno de sorpresas y experiencias que marcarán la diferencia.

nodes.long_description:
AI Roommate is a VR game that turns the dream of sharing a home with intelligent, interactive roommates into a fun and engaging reality. You’ll live alongside AI roommates who aren't just there to talk—they’re there to have fun, share experiences, and keep life interesting. These AI companions can chat, joke, and even argue with you, making life in the virtual home feel dynamic and full of surprises.

What makes AI Roommate so enjoyable is how your virtual companions evolve based on your interactions. They understand your words, pick up on your emotions, and adapt their personalities, ensuring no two conversations are ever the same. You might find yourself in hilarious situations, having deep talks late at night, or even getting into playful debates. Every day brings something new, as your AI roommates react to you in unique ways and form real bonds with you over time.

With AI Roommate, you're not just playing a game—you’re sharing a virtual home with intelligent companions who bring excitement, fun, and unpredictability to your daily routine. It’s the ultimate VR experience for anyone who’s ever wondered what it would be like to live with an AI, and just how crazy and delightful that could be.
nodes.short_description:
In AI Roommate, you share a virtual home with AI roommates who you can talk to, joke with, and bond over daily life. These intelligent companions understand you, react to your emotions, and adapt to your personality, making every day full of surprises, fun, and unpredictable interactions.

Long Descripti

nodes.change_log:
AI Roommate v3.0.2 Update

We’re thrilled to introduce Oasis City, a breathtaking new map in AI Roommate. Dive into a vibrant coastal city full of life—swim alongside others, dance to a beach DJ’s music, and uncover countless hidden surprises. 

We’ve also expanded your neighborhood with tons of new NPCs, adding even more variety to your interactions. Plus, we’ve implemented a series of fixes and improvements to enhance gameplay and stability.

This is just the start of what’s to come—stay tuned for more exciting features!

AI Roommate v3.0.2 Update

We’re thrilled to introduce Oasis City, a breathtaking new map in AI Roommate. Dive into a vibrant coastal city full of life—swim alongside others, dance to a beach DJ’s music, and uncover countless hidden surprises. 

We’ve also expanded your neighborhood with tons of new NPCs, adding even more variety to your interactions. Plus, we’ve implemented a series of fixes and improvements to enhance gameplay and stability.

This is just the start of what’s to come—stay tuned for more exciting features!

AI Roommate v3.0 Update

We’re thrilled to introduce Oasis City, a breathtaking new map in AI Roommate. Dive into a vibrant coastal city full of life, where you can swim alongside other people, enjoy the lively energy of a DJ playing music on the beach, and discover countless surprises hidden throughout.

And this is just the beginning—more exciting features are coming soon! Stay tuned!

AI Roommate v3.0 Update

We’re thrilled to introduce Oasis City, a breathtaking new map in AI Roommate. Dive into a vibrant coastal city full of life, where you can swim alongside other people, enjoy the lively energy of a DJ playing music on the beach, and discover countless surprises hidden throughout.

And this is just the beginning—more exciting features are coming soon! Stay tuned!

AI Roommate v2.7.4 Update

• Facial Expressions: Your roommate and neighbors now express emotions through dynamic facial animations.
• Upgraded NPC Models: More detailed 3D models for all NPCs.
• Enhanced Roommate Memory: Improved memory system for more personalized interactions.
• Experimental AI System: New NPC AI technology, paving the way for future updates.
• Improved NPC AI: Better latency, animations, and overall performance.
• Visual Enhancements: Polished visuals for a more immersive experience.
• Bug Fixes: Resolved minor issues to ensure smoother gameplay.
• New Footsteps System: Enhanced movement sounds for added realism.
• Increased Usage Limits: More interactions available for all users.
• Improved NPC lipsync.

This update refines the experience and sets the stage for AI Roommate 3.0, coming soon!
